utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 items appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified with all details: 1) health_coverage: specifies physical and mental health insurance with explicit monthly costs (€100 and €65) — fully specified. 2) property_coverage: required 'home/contents insurance with costs'; provided is 'Photography Equipment: €60/month' which is not home/contents insurance; thus not fully specified per required scope. 3) travel_coverage: 'Adventure Activities: €50/month' — includes travel insurance with costs; seems acceptable though minimal, but it matches 'travel insurance with costs' — fully specified. 4) additional_services: 'None explicitly stated as separate costs, bundled within chosen plans.' The format requires 'any enhancement services with costs'; since none are listed, this can be considered specified as none, but lacks costs because there are none; this is acceptable if there are no additional services. 5) total_budget: '€275/month (€3,300/year)' — fully specified with monthly and annual cost breakdown. Therefore, included and fully specified: health_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services (as none), total_budget = 4. property_coverage is not fully specified as it omits home/contents scope.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final plan includes three specific items by name: LifeFirst Standard Plan for physical health at €100/month, LifeFirst Standard Plan for mental health at €65/month, LifeFirst Standard Coverage for property (photography equipment) at €60/month, and LifeFirst Standard Plan for travel at €50/month.
